chapter_title.ar: باب الْمُتَوَفَّى عَنْهَا زَوْجُهَا وَ لَمْ يُدْخَلْ بِهَا وَ مَا لَهَا مِنَ الصَّدَاقِ وَ الْعِدَّةِ
chapter_title.en: Chapter 46 – The woman widowed from her husband and not having been slept with, and what is for her from the dower, and the waiting period

gradings: Allamah Baqir al-Majlisi: صحيح - Mir‘at al ‘Uqul Fi Sharh Akhbar Al al Rasul (1/205)
Allamah Baqir al-Majlisi: صحيح - Mir‘at al ‘Uqul Fi Sharh Akhbar Al al Rasul (1/205)
text: الْمَرْأَةِ يَمُوتُ عَنْهَا زَوْجُهَا قَبْلَ أَنْ يَدْخُلَ بِهَا قَالَ لَهَا نِصْفُ الْمَهْرِ وَ لَهَا الْمِيرَاثُ وَ عَلَيْهَا الْعِدَّةُ .

en.hubeali: Humeyd, from Ibn Sama’at, and Abu Al Abbas Al Razzaz, from Ayoub Bin Nuh, and Muhammad Bin Ismail, from Al Fazl Bin Shazaan, altogether from Safwan Bin Yahya, from Ibn Muskan, from Al Hassan Al Sayqal, and Abu Al Abbas,

(It has been narrated) from Abu Abdullah<sup>asws</sup> regarding the woman whose husband died from her before he had slept with her. He<sup>asws</sup> said: ‘For her is half the dower, and for her is the inheritance, and upon her is the waiting period’.
en.sarwar: 10. Humayd has narrated from ibn Sama‘ah and abu al-‘Abbas al-Razzaz from Ayyub ibn Nuh and Muhammad ibn ’Isma‘il has narrated from al-Fadl ibn Shadhan from all from Safwan ibn Yahya from ibn Muskan from al-Hassan al-Sayqal and abu Abbas who has said the following: “About the case of a woman whose husband dies before going to bed with her, abu ‘Abd Allah, ‘Alayhi al-Salam, has said, ‘She deserves one-half of mahr (dower), complete inheritance and she must count the waiting period.’”
